# src/test/fixtures Guide

This directory contains test fixture data.

## Responsibilities

- Provide published and closed survey fixtures.
- Provide bilingual survey fixtures with missing translations for fallback tests.
- Provide question fixtures for profile, experience, scale, single choice, multi-select, ranking, text, image tag, and attention check.
- Provide draft and submission fixtures, including corrupted draft data.

## Rules

- Keep fixtures small and explicit.
- Use stable ids and option values.
- Do not include real participant personal data.
- Keep fixture display labels separate from stored answer values.
